mapper.sql: r.refund_id as refundId, r.refund_no as refundNo, r.order_id as orderId, r.item_id as exchangeId, e.exchange_no as exchangeNo, e.user_id as userId, e.goods_id as goodsId, g.goods_name as goodsName, g.goods_type as goodsType, g.cover_image as coverImage, r.refund_type as refundType, r.reason, r.apply_cash as applyCash, r.apply_points as applyPoints, r.actual_cash as actualCash, r.actual_points as actualPoints, r.status, e.aftersale_status as aftersaleStatus, r.audit_remark as auditRemark, e.status as exchangeStatus, e.logistics_company as logisticsCompany, e.logistics_no as logisticsNo, e.address_snapshot_json as addressSnapshot, e.cash_amount as cashAmount, e.points_used as pointsUsed, e.ship_time as shipTime, e.complete_time as exchangeCompleteTime, r.create_time as createTime, r.complete_time as completeTime, r.remark as refundRemark, o.order_no as orderNo, o.order_status as orderStatus, o.pay_method as payMethod, p.payment_id as paymentId, p.payment_no as paymentNo, p.third_party_no as thirdPartyNo, p.pay_status as payStatus

from jst_refund_record r inner join jst_mall_exchange_order e on e.exchange_id = r.item_id and e.del_flag = '0' left join jst_mall_goods g on g.goods_id = e.goods_id and g.del_flag = '0' left join jst_order_main o on o.order_id = e.order_id and o.del_flag = '0' left join jst_payment_record p on p.payment_id = ( select pp.payment_id from jst_payment_record pp where pp.order_id = e.order_id and pp.del_flag = '0' order by pp.payment_id desc limit 1 ) where r.del_flag = '0' and r.refund_type in ('refund_only', 'return_refund')
mapper.select: select refund_id as refundId, refund_no as refundNo from jst_refund_record where refund_no = #{refundNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from jst_refund_record where item_id = #{exchangeId} and refund_type in ('refund_only', 'return_refund') and status in ('pending', 'approved', 'refunding') and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into jst_refund_record ( refund_no, order_id, item_id, refund_type, apply_source, reason, apply_cash, apply_points, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{refundNo}, #{orderId}, #{itemId}, #{refundType}, #{applySource}, #{reason}, #{applyCash}, #{applyPoints}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, '0' )
mapper.update: update jst_refund_record set status = #{targetStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, actual_cash = #{actualCash}, actual_points = #{actualPoints}, coupon_returned = #{couponReturned}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where refund_id = #{refundId} and status = #{expectedStatus} and del_flag = '0'
